- 固化時段（05:00-08:00）：低功耗

Actually, the cron says "Current time: Wednesday, May 13th, 2026 - 5:19 PM (Asia/Taipei)" which is 17:19. 

The trading session is 09:00-13:30 / 21:30-04:00, so 17:19 doesn't fall within either window. It's also outside the training period of 14:00-20:00 and the consolidation period of 05:00-08:00. I need to run the scheduler and figure out what mode applies at this time.
